message:
fix(scan): remove duplicate truncation message in markdown output

When truncating findings mid-file, we were printing two messages:
1. Inside <details>: "... and more findings not shown (limit: N)"
2. After all blocks: "Showing N of M findings. Use --top 0 to show all."

The inner message was redundant and potentially hidden inside a
collapsed details block. The outer message is more informative.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
